name: Par Lab Golf
about: Par Lab is a membership-only golf simulator facility located in Tempe, Arizona. It offers a large private golf bay with advanced technology including the Uneekor EYE XO2 launch monitor and access to over 1,000 golf courses. The venue provides a climate-controlled environment for sharpening skills or enjoying the game, with features like two 75-inch screens and a near 1,000 sq ft space. Catering to golfers of all skill levels, Par Lab is positioned as a premier destination for both serious practice and social play, available for large groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Largest hitting area on the market with Uneekor EYE XO2 technology
Comprehensive Performance Optix Package with detailed club and ball data
24/7 access to a private, climate-controlled 1,000 sq ft golf bay
Over 1,000 virtual golf courses available for play

food_and_drink.notes: Food available from local vendors; specific menu details not specified
No mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Three high-speed infrared cameras, largest hitting area on market

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available from local vendors on-site, but there is no mention of being able to bring outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the approximate time required to play a full 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Par Lab kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Par Lab is a private, membership-only facility focused on adult golfers and is not marketed as a kid-friendly venue.
